---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for ACCESS-XR.
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

# Feature Request

## Summary

Provide a concise description of the proposed feature.

---

## Motivation

Why is this feature needed?

Describe the problem or limitation that this feature addresses.

---

## Proposed Solution

Describe your proposed solution in as much detail as possible.

---

## Alternative Solutions

Describe any alternative approaches you have considered.

---

## Feature Category

Select all that apply.

- [ ] Gesture Recognition
- [ ] Speech Recognition
- [ ] Multimodal Fusion
- [ ] Semantic Representation
- [ ] Accessibility
- [ ] Frontend
- [ ] Backend
- [ ] API
- [ ] Dataset
- [ ] Model
- [ ] Benchmark
- [ ] Deployment
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Testing
- [ ] Performance Optimization
- [ ] Security
- [ ] Other

---

## Expected Benefits

Describe how this feature would improve ACCESS-XR.

Examples:

- Improved accessibility
- Better recognition accuracy
- Reduced latency
- Improved usability
- Enhanced reproducibility
- Better documentation
- Easier deployment

---

## Proposed Implementation

If you have implementation ideas, describe them here.

Examples:

- New algorithm
- Additional API endpoint
- UI enhancement
- Model optimization
- Documentation update
- Configuration improvement

---

## Compatibility

Will this feature maintain backward compatibility?

- [ ] Yes
- [ ] No
- [ ] Unsure

If no, explain why.

---

## Additional Resources

Provide any relevant references.

Examples:

- Research papers
- GitHub repositories
- Technical reports
- Standards
- Design documents

---

## Related Issues

List any related GitHub Issues or Pull Requests.

Example:

```
Fixes #42
Related to #18
```

---

## Priority

How important is this feature?

- [ ] Critical
- [ ] High
- [ ] Medium
- [ ] Low

---

## Will You Implement It?

- [ ] Yes, I plan to submit a Pull Request.
- [ ] I can help with implementation.
- [ ] No, I am only suggesting the feature.

---

## Checklist

Before submitting this request:

- [ ] I searched existing feature requests.
- [ ] This feature is not already available.
- [ ] I have explained the motivation.
- [ ] I have described the expected benefits.
- [ ] I understand that inclusion depends on project priorities.

---

## Additional Comments

Add any additional context, mock-ups, diagrams, or implementation notes that may help the maintainers evaluate this proposal.

---

Thank you for helping improve ACCESS-XR. Thoughtful feature proposals help guide the project's future development while maintaining alignment with its research and accessibility goals.
